# DELETE /{encryptedToken}

**Delete File**

حذف الملف

Operation ID: `delete`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| encryptedToken | string | Yes |  |

## Response `200` — OK

Shape: `FileDeleteConfirmation`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| fileDocumentPk | integer (int64) | No |  | File document ID - معرف مستند الملف | 501 |
| fileStatusId | string | No |  | File status (LOV-FILE-002) - حالة الملف | DELETED |

**Response Example**

```json
{
  "fileDocumentPk": 501,
  "fileStatusId": "DELETED"
}
```
